content.text:
Looking at the chart image, I can see vertical bars representing fatalities for each year from 2004 to 2015. The bars extend downward, with taller bars indicating more fatalities.

<think>
The chart shows yearly fatality data with downward bars. Examining the heights:
- 2004-2007: relatively short bars
- 2008-2009: bars start getting taller
- 2009-2010: visibly the tallest bars in the chart
- 2011-2015: bars become progressively shorter

The peak appears to be around 2009-2010. The tallest single cluster of bars appears to be centered around 2010, which historically was the peak year for US drone strikes in Pakistan.
</think>

<answer>
2010
</answer>
